notes: Game runs great with about ~60-100 fps depending on the scene, I tested the legacy missions (ported missions from Hitman 2016) and for some reason I achieve higher performance than the official linux port from Hitman 2016. Only downsides are occasional hiccups but otherwise it runs without any glitches. As others have stated the game currently won't connect to online services with Proton Beta 3.16-4.

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: game can't connect to server. prolog mission is playable. for all others, if you have any little bugs, strange performance drops or it needs some little tweaks: the game is NOT PLATINUM
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Totally borked with 3.16-4. Game immediately crashes in radeon_dri.so! With Proton 3.7-8 game starts up and looks to be working, only to freeze the screen and keyboard (computer and kernel still are ok, and even audio is working) one you are in the mission after 10 seconds or less - my only option was to reboot a system. Only workable workaround is to use AMD vulkan drivers (amdvlkn), which are a pain in the ass to install, and causes other games to have worse performance. Once you do that (amd vulkan drivers), the game is actually playable, but: 1) there is severe stutter on first play, 2) there are few minor artifacts, 3) I still can't connect to online servers. And that is just from testing it for about an hour on just two maps. Not recommended! PS. This is for a "free" version, so test it yourself.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Runs pretty good, better than the linux port of its predecessor.  3.16-4 also works, but you will be unable to connect online.  use 3.7-8 for the time being.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: 4k on high settings gave 25-50fps. Possible it gets more stable after some caching, eitherwise there is room to go down in settings.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Will not connect to server on Proton 3.17-4, use 3.7-8. Only other issue experienced was the game hanging when trying to exit through the menu - needs to be forced closed. Everything else worked flawlessly.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Connection with server can't be estabilished. In offline mode gameplay is limited but otherwise would be Platinum with 70ish steady fps on ultra settings. Very close to Platinum.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: After upgrading from Mesa 18.1.9 to 18.2.0, the game actually doesn't crash or freezes my system anymore, even with Proton 3.16-4. And compared to amdvlkn drivers, there are no graphical glitches at all (there were few very minor ones in amdvlkn). There is still minor stuttering due to shader compilations on the first play when entering new areas / levels, but it is also better than in amdvlkn. Other than that game looks to be working nicely, smoothly, etc. The game still can't connect to online servers, so achievements and various challenges can't be played.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Used on the stable branch of Proton (3.78, Going beta won't let you connect online.) The only issue I would say is that when you exit the game, it would freeze for a while and the only way to properly close it is to force close wine, other than that I'd say this game is playable and should be fine for the average user.

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
The game works flawlessly. There's an initial stutter on shader compilation, but once it's done, the game keeps up the framerate at 50-60 fps. 

Ghost mode / Sniper Assassin wasn't tested. Holiday Hoarders event mission wasn't tested.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Latest Proton 3.16-6 beta works perfectly online. Quitting no longer hangs. Runs smoothly, except for very first run whilst shaders cache (approx 5-10 min). Save/Load bug fixed in latest Hitman hotfix on Dec-21. Over 100 hours logged in-game online in total (mostly 3.7-8).
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: With 3.16-6 and "steam-native" multiplayer functionality is 100% working.  Game exits without wine crashing. No crashing was observed. Although, performance is sub-par and generally 50% slower of what I observed running on windows.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Performance is close to when running on Windows. To get multiplayer working, you need gnutls <= 3.0 and be running steam-native. No crashing or texture corruption etc. Only issue seems that you can't move the mouse outside of the game window.

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
Mostly fine. Some minor audio glitches, probably related to one CPU thread being fully used.

Be sure to open the Steam overlay if you want to move input focus to another window: if you don't, the game may start lagging in response to mouse movement.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
If the game crash after clicking on "Play", check that 64bits Vulkan drivers are correctly installed (eg. with 'vulkaninfo' in a terminal).
Performance is great, getting 75-150fps on 1080p low in the Paris level.
Way better than with the native Hitman 2016 on the same level.
title: HITMAN™ 2
